seo.default_description: LrGeniusAI — free, open-source AI plugin for Lightroom Classic. AI keywording, semantic search, photo culling, and face recognition. Runs locally via Ollama or LM Studio, or via cloud AI.
seo.keywords: Lightroom Classic, AI Plugin, Keywording, Semantic Search, Ollama, ChatGPT, Photo Management, Image Description, Face Recognition, Local AI
cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. By clicking 'Accept', you consent to our use of cookies and Google Analytics.
